The WTSAY Confirmation (Completed 05/07/18)
Transcript by Rev.com
Page 1 of 3
Speaker 1: Hey guys, welcome to theme plate four, the what this says about you confirmation. And
this is going to be email two within the minimum viable funnel, so this is kind of self
explanatory. This is the confirmation that comes right after they opt in to your funnel,
whether that's for your video series, whether that's for your webinar, whether that's for
your lead magnet, whatever content you're using, whatever launch strategy you're
using. There is always going to be a confirmation email. That's what makes this whole
coaching conversion process very much funnel agnostic because these things, these
themes, these aspects of the journey recur, usually across just about any type of launch
or system.
So, as we've discussed, more marketers will totally fail to recognize the power of the
confirmation email. But it's the very first thing I will personally look at when working
with new clients and optimizing any of their existing sequences. Because the current
version is always some spin on the following.
Thanks for signing up. You're in. We're going to have a lot of fun. Awesome. K, bye.
That might be a little bit of an exaggeration, but it's not an exaggeration in the sense
that there's no additional value given, no confirmation of their decision, no adding of
meaning to their action or teasing of what's to come. So that's just a whole stack of
missed opportunities, and I want us all to just give ourselves a little upgrade right now.
So, the general format of this, and it's less dependent on the structure and that
container, and more dependent on having these right ingredients.
And what you want to be selling or coaching here are just these five Cs. Confidence and
reassurance in their decision. You want to confirm what this says about them, hence the
name of the theme plate. And just give clarity around the outcomes they can expect,
curiosity around the way the outcome will be delivered or experienced. Because
remember, there's no product here. It's still that moment of least friction in your funnel.
But there could still be some curiosity around it. How are we actually going to do it
because curiosity drives that excitement, which is the main milestone we're trying to
achieve here. And then credibility that you can deliver it.
So here is a theme plate you can go to. This is a container. It's less dependent on
following this step by step, so feel free to break through those boundaries if it feels right
to do so as long as you're hitting on those five Cs. But you will congratulate them on the
previous action, you'll confirm to them that this is a bigger deal than they may suspect.
And this is the big one. You will diagnose what the action tells you about them. These
are the positive traits that you get to remind them of and urge them to remain
consistent with later on when you make your offer.
Tell them they'll be rewarded for that action and what pains, fears, frustrations, things
they'll no longer stand for that they'll no longer have to deal with. So this is that
moment of highest tension, once again making that reappearance. And what pleasures
or desires or positive outcomes will they soon experience as their new normal. And then
you could drop a little credibility bomb as to why they can trust you to deliver it. And
then you could close by creating a sense of ease that just presupposes they'll be doing
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 3 --

The WTSAY Confirmation (Completed 05/07/18)
Transcript by Rev.com
Page 2 of 3
something later. Like nothing else to do now, just sit back, relax, and get ready to solve
that problem.
So, let's see how this plays out. Subject, thanks for confirming. Here's what this says
about you. So this is that open loop. Most people want to see what that means. It's very
diagnostic. It's saying something about it. So it elicits a very primal curiosity and right
away, it puts you in that leadership authority role. For you to be in a place where you
can even diagnose something. Being diagnostic is authority. It's a form of authority. So
we're leading off right in the subject line and right early on in our funnel. This is as soon
as they've opted into it. And here we go.
On behalf of millions of teens across the country, I wanted to take a quick second to
thank you for signing up for your free video series. So affirming their decision to join,
making them realize that it's more significant than they may have thought. On behalf of
millions of teens across the country. First video should be landing in your inbox in just a
few minutes, but first, some real talk. As a parent of a teen, I know things can be crazy
on you sometimes. You want the best for your kid. Your heart's in the right place. So
we're reflecting back some positive traits, some things they'd be proud to have reflected
back about them. Yeah, thank you for noticing that it's tough, and thank you for noticing
my heart's in the right place.
Yet despite your sincere heartfelt efforts to lead them down a healthy productive path,
you keep smacking up against a wall of resistance. Acting out, aggressive outbursts, and
stone cold silence seem to be the reward for your care and concern. This is where you're
having them nodding their head. It's a neck brace moment. Acting out, aggressive
outbursts, oh yeah I just said that. Okay, moving on. And if you're feeling unappreciated,
fearful, angry, impatient, and even downright resigned or hopeless, all I can tell you is
that this is normal. So we're validating that experience. You're not alone. We're making
it more about the community, really making it less isolating.
And if you stick around, you'll soon know how to expertly navigate your way through it.
And here's why I'm hopeful for you. And this is where we're going to get into a reminder
of the outcome they came here for. Despite all the challenges in front of you, you still
found this page and had the courage to put your name in that email box. This signals
three things to me. This is getting super diagnostic here. Now we're really adding
meaning to the click. You still abso-freaking-lutely care. You're not ready to give up. And
you're ready to empower yourself with the right tools and techniques to meet the
challenges of the modern day parent.
Now this isn't manipulative at all. This is absolutely true. They opted in to get some tools
and techniques. And they're ready to empower themselves. So that's something we get
to call them, hold them consistent with later to continuing, to continue empowering
themselves when the tools and techniques continue to present themselves in the form
of your product. I'm proud to have you in the family. That's a little bit of inclusiveness
and reassurance. And I can't wait to reward your perseverance with the tools that will
totally transform your relationship with the teen in your life. Much more to come, but
for now, keep your eyes pealed on video one. So that's really that more relaxed note
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

that presupposes they're going to be engaged later. Like rest up now, because you're
going to be working later.
So, that is the what this says about you confirmation. And on that note, I am going to
catch a breath, and then meet you back for theme plate five, which is similar, but I just
wanted to give you a little bit of a different look, how we would do it let's say if
someone was opting in for a webinar. So, that's it for now. I will take a breather. Catch
my breath, and catch you back in theme plate number five. See you then.
